scripts.test:observation: env PYTHONPATH=services/observation python3 -m unittest discover -s services/observation/tests -v
scripts.test:forecasting: env PYTHONPATH=services/forecasting python3 -m unittest discover -s services/forecasting/tests -v
scripts.test:operations: env PYTHONPATH=services/operations python3 -m unittest discover -s services/operations/tests -v
